findings.title: Identifier-only scope is correctly enforced with no HermesGate model/tenant-scope creep
findings.rationale: RP00.P01.M03.S02 implements only HERMES_GATE_IDENTIFIER_POLICY, normalizeHermesGateId, and validateHermesGateId. No HermesGate tenant scope, Matter trace, verdict/lifecycle enum, ownership, relationship map, field registries, transition map, validation helper, factory, or full model was found.

findings.title: Pre-C00 closeout state: review-result, adjudication, and construction-inspection artifacts not yet present
findings.rationale: The subphase was correctly in implemented state at C00 review time, with claude_cross_validation and production_readiness pending and only packet plus command evidence present.
findings.recommendation: Add review result, adjudication, construction inspection, promote production_ready status fields, and rerun the no-write command matrix.

findings.title: Cross-entity stylistic inconsistency in prefix pre-check (non-behavioral)
findings.rationale: normalizeHermesGateId uses a case-sensitive prefix check while normalizeAIControlRuleId uses a lowercased prefix pre-check. Both are fail-closed and reject the required invalid forms; only the error-message path differs.
findings.recommendation: Optionally align identifier normalizers in a future consistency slice; no change needed for S02 closeout.

parsed_review.summary: PASS_WITH_FINDINGS. RP00.P01.M03.S02 implements only the HermesGate primary entity identifier policy. HERMES_GATE_IDENTIFIER_POLICY, normalizeHermesGateId, and validateHermesGateId enforce gate_id, hg_ prefix, canonical lowercase snake-case pattern, forbidden forms, no_real_data=true, writesProductState=false, tenant scope deferral to RP00.P01.M03.S03, and nextSubphase RP00.P01.M03.S03. The registry exposes hermesGateIdentifierPolicy while keeping the HermesGate entity future-only with implementedSubphase=null. The synthetic fixture records hg_rp00_h00_control_plane with correct policy_ref, subphase, next_subphase, no-real-data, and no-write fields. Tests and validator cover accept/reject behavior, fixture validation, registry parity, no-write evidence, H00 wiring, and construction inspection. No real data or product-state writes are present. No P0/P1/P2 findings.

raw_review_excerpt: overall_verdict=PASS_WITH_FINDINGS; blocks_subphase_closeout=false; blocks_goal_closeout=false; findings=P3_NOTE only; no P0/P1/P2 findings.
